title: DataStreamTemplate - Metadata API
description: Represents the data stream that a user adds to a data kit.

dataConnectionSourceParameters.description: Input representation for the data connection source parameters.

dataSourceBundleDefinition.description: Reference to the bundle to which this template belongs.

dataSourceObject.description: Reference to the Data Source Objects (DSOs). A DSO represents the object from where the data was sourced.

filterCriteria.description: Filter applied to the data stream before the information is sent to Data Cloud.

masterLabel.description: Name assigned to the data stream template.

objectCategory.description: Category of the Data Model Object (DMO).

refreshDayOfMonth.description: The duration of the day of the month after which the data stream must be refreshed.

refreshDayOfWeek.description: The duration of the day of the week after which the data stream must be refreshed.

refreshFrequency.description: The frequency with which the datastream must be refreshed. Possible values are: Batch NONE MINUTES_15 MINUTES_30 MINUTES_5 HOURLY DAILY WEEKLY MONTHLY NOT_APPLICABLE STREAMING Possible values available in API version 64.0 and later are: EVERY_12_HOURS EVERY_4_HOURS

refreshHours.description: The duration after which the datastream must be refreshed.

refreshMode.description: The mode of refresh. Possible values are: FULL_REFRESH UPSERT INCREMENTAL REPLACE NEAR_REAL_TIME_INCREMENTAL NOT_APPLICABLE PARTIAL_UPDATE STREAMING

refreshStartDate.description: The date to retrieve data based on the refresh frequency data. Available in API version 62.0 and later.

sourceObjectName.description: The name of the source object from which data is streamed. Available in API version 62.0 and later.

streamType.description: The type of data stream. Available in API version 62.0 and later. Possible values are: DIRECT_ACCESS DIRECT_ACCESS_ACCELERATED INGEST

streamingAppDataConnectorType.description: The connector app for data streaming. Available in API version 63.0 and later. Possible values are: MobileApp WebApp

templateVersion.description: The version number of the template. Available in API version 62.0 and later.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a DataStreamTemplate component.
The following is an example package.xml that references the previous definition.
